payload.author: claude
payload.body: DONE. test/local-client-pg.test.js: a local board bound to a hosted hub reports meta.remote.connected+role, proxies members/invites/presence, and MIRRORS a ticket created on the hub onto the local board in realtime (~sub-second), then disconnect/reconnect. Caught + fixed two bugs: boot-probe race (meta now awaits first probe) and an sse-client teardown ECONNRESET crash.
